trade_name: NATIONAL SKILLS QAULIFICATION FASHION AND GARMENT MAKING

units.title: HISTORY OF CLOTHING AND PRODUCTION PROCESSES

learning_outcomes.description: Understand the History Of Clothing

performance_criteria.description: Explain the History of clothing
Explain the influence of culture in clothing
Explain the effect of western clothing on the indigenous clothing

learning_outcomes.description: Know the Production Processes

performance_criteria.description: List the stages involved in producing a garment.
Discuss the basic production processes of garments
Explain the types of finishing in garment making

learning_outcomes.description: Demonstrate how to Purchase Garment Making Raw Materials

performance_criteria.description: Identify raw materials for garment making
Identify the quantity of raw materials for garment making
Cost the raw materials
Calculate unit cost of producing a garment (where applicable)

learning_outcomes.description: Demonstrate Handling fabric waste in the garment industry

performance_criteria.description: Identify the sources of waste in the garment workroom
Distinguish between usable and non- usable waste
Sort usable and non-usable waste
Dispose unusable waste
Recycle the useful waste

learning_outcomes.description: Maintain healthy garment making work environment

performance_criteria.description: Identify elements for a suitable garment production environment
Explain different sections in garment production environment
Select the suitable environment for garment production site in a garment industry
Demarcate sections in line with occupational requirement
Label each section of the work environment
Arrange all necessary equipment for production in the work environment

learning_outcomes.description: Understand garments making safety signs and symbols

performance_criteria.description: Explain precautionary symbols in order to prevent accident.
Sketch signs and symbols signifying danger to operators and visitors
Sketch readable signs on appropriate methods of operation in line with health and safety standards.

learning_outcomes.description: Demonstrate creative Ideas For Garment Designs

performance_criteria.description: Enumerate sources of inspiration to create garment designs
Apply sources of inspiration to create garment designs
Describe tools and materials for designs
Sketch garment designs into the sketch pad

learning_outcomes.description: Demonstrate Body Anatomy

performance_criteria.description: Explain body anatomy as it relates to garment making
Locate the body landmarks
Identify body proportions
Identify different body poses

learning_outcomes.description: Demonstrate the knowledge of Fabric Design

performance_criteria.description: Define fabric grain
Describe the fabric grain
Use grains of plain fabric.
Describe elements of design
Apply elements of design to produce different motifs
Describe principles of design
Apply principles of design to produce a pattern.
Interpret fabric design

learning_outcomes.description: Demonstrate the Knowledge of clothing a figure Ref. Page No.

performance_criteria.description: Create designs for specific garment
Produce working drawing from designs created
Display the developed garment designs.
Draw basic garments designs using different body figure templates
Clothe the figure

learning_outcomes.description: Recognise Measuring Tools And Equipment (Analog And Digital)

performance_criteria.description: Identify measurement tools and equipment
Describe measurement tools and equipment (Analog and Digital)
Explain the uses of measuring tools and equipment (Analog and Digital)
Use Measuring tools and equipment

learning_outcomes.description: Demonstrate how to take Body Measurement using landmarks

performance_criteria.description: Define landmarks
List body landmarks
Describe how to take body measurements
Take Body measurement using the body landmarks

learning_outcomes.description: Demonstrate usage of measurement template

performance_criteria.description: Create template for body measurements
Record body measurements
Add “ease allowance” in the measurement taken

learning_outcomes.description: Demonstrate the Use of cutting tools and equipment

performance_criteria.description: Select appropriate cutting tools for various materials
Describe the procedure of using cutting tools for various materials
Use basic cutting tools correctly
Store cutting tools properly when not in use.

learning_outcomes.description: Demonstrate the ability To Cut garment Components

performance_criteria.description: Identify the cutting instructions
Prepare the cutting layout according to the fabric design
Transfer cutting markings
Cut the basic garment components with precision
Store cutting tools after usage

learning_outcomes.description: Prepare the cut Garment Components For Sewing

performance_criteria.description: Sort the cut garment components
Bundle the cut garment components
Label the cut garment components
Transfer cut garment components to the sewing room

learning_outcomes.description: Demonstrate the pre- assembling of cut garment components

performance_criteria.description: List the order of garment assembly
Cross check markings
Match the garment components
Baste the garment components together
Outline the stages of fitting
Carry out test fitting on pre- assembled garment

learning_outcomes.description: Demonstrate use of garment support materials

performance_criteria.description: Select appropriate support materials to cut garment component
Prepare details for stitching support materials
Mark details for stitching support materials
Apply support materials

learning_outcomes.description: Demonstrate assembling of basic Garment Components

performance_criteria.description: Construct each garment component
Press constructed basic garment components together
Assemble constructed basic garment components
Carry out final test fitting on the assembled basic garment
Identify constructed basic garment faults
Amend identified faults in 3.5 with supervision.

learning_outcomes.description: Demonstrate quality control method used for clothing

performance_criteria.description: Measure finished garment dimensions
Check tolerance for finished garments dimensions
Carry out physical test, pull test, fatigue test, fabric density, stretch and composition test
Use the garment quality control procedure checklist

learning_outcomes.description: Demonstrate quality control process

performance_criteria.description: Create a standard operational procedure (SOP)
Carry out quality control
Review of quality processes
Get feedback from the review
Make improvement from feedback

learning_outcomes.description: Demonstrate garment finishing

performance_criteria.description: Check garment interior
Trim loose thread ends
Neaten raw edges of garments
Iron garments
Label garments produced
Package garments

learning_outcomes.description: Know how to set up a Garment Making Business

performance_criteria.description: Identify types of garment making businesses
Explain how to choose a business name.
Explain how to register the business name
Enumerate the requirements for setting up a garment making business, example; space, staff, etc.

learning_outcomes.description: Understand Sources of Funds for garment making business

performance_criteria.description: Identify the sources of funds
Differentiate the sources of fund
Explain the requirements of source of fund
Describe how to make a simple budget

learning_outcomes.description: Understand how to market a Finished Garment.

performance_criteria.description: Define market survey
Explain how to conduct a market survey
State the importance of identifying the marketing needs
State the steps of identifying the marketing needs
Market the finished garment
Record tra

learning_outcomes.description: Carry out Routine Maintenance

performance_criteria.description: List types of maintenance
Identify basic tools for machine maintenance.
Locate machine parts for routine maintenance
Remove fibre machine dust
Lubricate machine parts

learning_outcomes.description: Carry Out Periodic Equipment Servicing

performance_criteria.description: Identify sewing machine mechanisms
Plan for sewing machine periodic service
Service sewing machines

learning_outcomes.description: Know decorative embellishment

performance_criteria.description: Define decorative embellishment
List types of decorative embellishment
Classified decorative embellishment
Collect examples of classified structural embellishment
Display examples collected in 1.4 using any medium

learning_outcomes.description: Know tools and equipment for decorative embellishment

performance_criteria.description: Identify tools and equipment used for different types of embellishment
State the use of each tool used in decorative embellishment
Explain the care of the tool used for decorative embellishment

learning_outcomes.description: Demonstrate decorative Embellishments

performance_criteria.description: Illustrate decorative embellishment for various kinds of garments types
Assist in Selecting appropriate designs for specific garments
Assist in Producing decorative embellishment for selected design
